title: The Great Mental Models: General Thinking Concepts, Volume 5
subtitle: Advanced synthesis across disciplines: compound learning, probabilistic thinking, and the latticework framework applied to complex real-world problems.
author: Shane Parrish
themes: Map Is Not the Territory — Applied
awards: Lattice Publishing Bestseller — General Thinking Concepts Series
excerpt: Volume 5 synthesizes the key general thinking concepts into a unified framework. The power is not in knowing a single model but in combining them — compounding your understanding over time, inverting problems to avoid stupidity, and building a latticework that lets you see the territory behind every map.
